Ground nests, wall voids, and high-elevation nests may require different treatment approaches. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common near the Perth Amboy waterfront?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are common throughout Perth Amboy, including waterfront areas near Sadowski Parkway and the Raritan Bay. They build nests in ground cavities, wall voids, attics, and landscaping, becoming especially aggressive in late summer and early fall when protecting their colonies.
